nodes.label: Home Screen Wireframe
nodes.description: PromptLab home/dashboard screen. Green gradient background with the PromptLab logo top-left, cat avatar top-right, a central search bar with AI sparkle icon, three main navigation cards (My Skills, Prompt Library, Learning Lab), a 'Continue Learning' section with horizontally scrollable topic chips (Trending Skills, Community, Design, Grapho Science, Prompt, etc.), and the mascot cat holding a phone in the bottom-right corner.
